The '''oldest son of [[Nash Llalik|Nash]] and [[Loran Llalik]]''' had two younger siblings: [[Nashiak Llalik|Nashiak]], a boy, and [[Saren Llalik|Saren]], a girl. All of them were born on [[Plavin 6]].

This person, whose first name is unknown, joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] as an adult along with his sister. At that time, Nashiak joined [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]].
